data.body: CHECKPOINT 2/6: Code patterns understood ✓ — validate-review-output.sh uses Python inline validators; code-review-dispatch schema currently requires EXACTLY 3 keys (scores, findings, summary) and rejects extras. review_tier would currently be rejected. Tests will use _snapshot_fail + assert_pass_if_clean pattern for the RED test block, plus direct assert_eq/assert_ne for simpler cases.
